title: Two-Axis Knowledge Archive (time axis)
description: Historical record of completed work organized by completion date and epic. Flat per-story array plus per-epic rollup. Records what was done, when, and duration — never duplicates git's content.

stories.description: Flat primary array of completed stories, ordered by completion date. Filterable by domain without flattening.

epics.description: Keyed rollup by epic/work-unit ID (EP## or AGN##) for lookup and aggregation.

id.description: Story/work-unit id, e.g. EP44-ST01 or AGN05.

epic.description: Owning epic id, or null for loose maintenance stories that belong to no epic.

track.description: Work track: project (product features/infrastructure) or agentic (agent/workflow development).

domain.description: Workspace unit: apps/*, packages/* for project work, or agentic/<ryoiki> for agent work.

ryoiki.description: The distinct aspect of the domain this story is about (e.g., routing, audio, scheduling) — the same word used as the unit's KNOWLEDGE.md section heading for this content. Free-form, no controlled vocabulary.

completed.description: Completion date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Primary sort key for timeline ordering.

summary.description: What was done (action verbs). Points to git history, does not duplicate commit messages.

supersedes.description: Story IDs this work replaced or obsoleted.

fixes.description: Sealed epic/story IDs this story corrects without reopening them.

pr.description: Provenance PR number (stable across squash-merge, never a commit SHA). Null only for agentic work with no PR.

compact_pr.description: PR number of the epic's compaction commit (when this story's changelog folder was archived). Null until the epic is compacted.

domains.description: Distinct workspace units this epic touched.

archived.description: Date the epic was archived and its changelog folder compacted, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

notes.description: Optional epic-level rollup note (deferrals, tombstone rationale).
